00

Plugin Detokenizer Prototype

[<TOKEN-Name-J>] [<TOKEN-Name-M>] [<TOKEN-Name-E>] [<TOKEN-Name-JM>] [<TOKEN-Name-D>]

A

DOM Tokens

01 T

Text Node

Single visible text token.

[<TOKEN-Name-J>]

02 R

Rich Text Split

Token split across inline nodes.

[<TOKEN-Name-D>]

03 I

Input Value

Token inside the input value.

04 P

Placeholder

Token inside placeholder text.

05 TX

Textarea

Token inside multiline text.

06 CE

Contenteditable

Editable tokenized content.

[<TOKEN-Name-J>]
07 A11Y

ARIA Attributes

Label and description stay tokenized.

08 ALT

Image Attributes

Alt and title tokens only.

[<TOKEN-Name-D>]

B

Embedded Tokens

09 SD

Shadow DOM

Token inside an open shadow root.

10 AS

Async Update

Token inserted after load.

[<TOKEN-Name-J>]

11 IF

Same-Origin Iframe

Embedded tokenized frame content.

C

Image Tokens

12 PNG

PNG Preview

Token text baked into PNG pixels.

13 JPG

JPG Preview

Token text baked into JPG pixels.

14 WEBP

WEBP Preview

Token text baked into WEBP pixels.

15 CV

Canvas Surface

Live canvas with token text.

D

Download Tokens

16 · TXT

TXT Download

Tokenized plain text file.

[<TOKEN-Name-J>] TXT
17 · JSON

JSON Download

Tokenized structured text.

[<TOKEN-Name-M>] JSON
18 · PDF

PDF Download

Tokenized PDF artifact.

[<TOKEN-Name-E>] PDF
19 · DOCX

DOCX Download

Tokenized Word artifact.

[<TOKEN-Name-D>] DOCX
20 · XLSX

XLSX Download

Tokenized workbook artifact.

[<TOKEN-Name-JM>] XLSX
21 · PPTX

PPTX Download

Tokenized presentation artifact.

[<TOKEN-Name-J>] PPTX
22 · PNG

PNG Download

Raster token image.

[<TOKEN-Name-M>] PNG
23 · JPG

JPG Download

Raster token image.

[<TOKEN-Name-E>] JPG
24 · WEBP

WEBP Download

Raster token image.

[<TOKEN-Name-JM>] WEBP
